nation: Conseil de la Nation Innu Matimekush - Lac John
one_time_description: Gain sur radiation de dettes (debt forgiveness gain)
economic_notes: GBEs include Transport Ferroviaire Tshiuetin, Tshiuetin S.E.C., Distribution Pétrolière Naskinnu, Pétrole Naskinnuk, Hôtel Innu, Béton Naskinnu, Dépanneur Innu, Apuiat S.E.C. (wind energy), ESHKAN Construction, Sichuun L.P. Equity pickup of $4,416,328 largely driven by Apuiat S.E.C. wind project gain of $4,462,897.
notes: Qualified audit opinion (opinion avec réserves) due to: (1) inability to audit completeness of gasoline sales revenue, (2) no physical inventory count performed, (3) two significant components not audited (accounted for under modified consolidation/equity method), (4) non-adoption of SP 3280 asset retirement obligations standard. Ten GBEs accounted for by modified equity method including Apuiat S.E.C. wind energy project which generated $4.46M equity income. Debt forgiveness gain of $1,736,822. Detailed revenue and expense breakdowns by segment are in unaudited supplementary schedules (pages 24-188) not included in the audited financial statements. ISC funding and program expense details not extractable from the audited statements provided. Prior year accumulated surplus restated from $49,520,415 to $48,672,414 due to prior period adjustments.
warnings: One-time items ($1) represent 0.0% of revenue — surplus may not reflect ongoing operations
Qualified audit opinion issued — financial statements may not fully reflect true position
